front.title: IPv6 over Low-Power Wireless Personal Area Network (6LoWPAN) Paging Dispatch
front.workgroup: IPv6 over Networks of Resource-constrained Nodes

abstract.t: This specification updates RFC 4944 to introduce a new context switch mechanism for IPv6 over Low-Power Wireless Personal Area Network (6LoWPAN) compression, expressed in terms of Pages and signaled by a new Paging Dispatch.
